title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a text generation model that applies diffusion techniques from image generation to achieve token generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The model uses uniform state diffusion and bidirectional passes to refine text generation, shifting the computational bottleneck from memory-bound to compute-bound operations.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, a text generation model from Google DeepMind that adapts diffusion techniques from image generation to produce text at over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. It explains that the model relies on uniform state diffusion and bidirectional passes to refine generated text, rather than the standard left-to-right autoregressive approach. The central technical point is the shift of the computational bottleneck from memory-bound to compute-bound operations, which is what enables the higher throughput.
